name: Artichoke Quiche#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion and garlic in a few drops of oil until soft.
2. Beat eggs well in a large bowl. Add all other ingredients.
3. Pour mixture into a well greased quiche dish.
4. Bake for 30 minutes at 325 degrees Fahrenheit until a knife inserted comes out clean.
5. Cool slightly and serve.
